headline: Is Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) Still Attractively Priced After Its Strong Multi Year Run
summary: Wondering if Royal Caribbean Cruises at around US$255.89 is offering genuine value or just riding sentiment? This breakdown will help you see how the current price lines up with several valuation yardsticks. The stock has had a mixed run recently, with a 5.7% decline over the last week and a 2.3% decline over the last month, yet it still sits on a 19.9% return over the past year and a strong multi year record including a 286.0% return over three years and 211.7% over five years.
